ai.title: AI ASSISTANT
ai.welcome: Hello! I am CraftIDE AI Assistant. I can help you with Minecraft plugin development.
ai.hint: Example: "Open a shop menu when players type /shop"
ui.welcome.wt.getStarted.title: Get Started with CraftIDE
ui.welcome.wt.getStarted.desc: Customize your editor, learn the basics, and start coding
ui.welcome.wt.learnBasics.title: Learn the Basics
ui.welcome.wt.build.title: Build and Test Plugin
ui.welcome.wt.build.desc: Create JAR with Maven/Gradle and run a test server

ui.welcome.wt.server.desc: Create, start and test your plugin directly
ui.welcome.wt.api.title: API Reference
ui.welcome.subtitle: Minecraft Development Studio
ui.welcome.idea.title: Turn a Minecraft idea into a working project flow
ui.welcome.idea.desc: Write what you want to build, choose the target mode, and jump straight into the visual builder with AI-assisted setup.
ui.welcome.idea.label: Project idea
ui.welcome.idea.placeholder: Example: when players join, give them a starter kit and show a welcome title
ui.welcome.paths.title: Recommended creator paths
ui.welcome.paths.subtitle: CraftIDE can route this idea into the most useful designer.
ui.welcome.paths.command.title: Command Designer
ui.welcome.paths.command.desc: Shape a command flow with subcommands and arguments.
ui.welcome.paths.shop.title: GUI Shop
ui.welcome.paths.shop.desc: Start a chest menu for shop or server navigation flows.
ui.welcome.paths.quest.title: Quest Designer
ui.welcome.paths.quest.desc: Create guided missions with objectives, rewards and claim flows.
ui.welcome.paths.region.title: Region Designer
ui.welcome.paths.region.desc: Protect spawn, claims and PvP zones with guided flags.
ui.welcome.paths.loot.title: Loot Designer
ui.welcome.paths.loot.desc: Create loot drops, starter rewards and crate-style giveaways.
ui.welcome.paths.npc.title: NPC Dialogue
ui.welcome.paths.npc.desc: Generate dialogue files and option branches for guide NPCs.
ui.welcome.paths.command.sub: Best for command-first ideas, automation and admin tools.
ui.welcome.paths.shop.sub: Best for menus, shops and button-based player flows.
ui.welcome.paths.quest.sub: Best for daily quests, collection goals and reward-driven progression.
ui.welcome.paths.region.sub: Best for spawn protection, safe zones and anti-grief rules.
ui.welcome.paths.loot.sub: Best for boss loot, join rewards and claimable reward flows.
ui.welcome.paths.npc.sub: Best for dialogue, quest givers and guided interactions.
ui.welcome.idea.previewEmptySummary: Describe an idea and CraftIDE will summarize the likely project flow here.
ui.welcome.idea.previewEmptyActions: CraftIDE turns your request into a visual graph, suggests missing blocks, and opens the right builder flow.
ui.welcome.idea.previewEmptyNext: Start the AI flow to open the one-step builder with your idea prefilled.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.summary: CraftIDE will prepare a {mode}-focused draft for this idea.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.next: Start the flow, review the generated graph, and inspect the suggested logic before building.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.event.command: The main trigger will likely be a command flow.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.event.join: The main trigger will likely be a player join event.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.event.death: The main trigger will likely be a player death event.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.event.generic: The flow will begin from a Minecraft event or interaction.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.action.item: An item or reward will be granted.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.action.teleport: Players will be moved to a target location.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.action.gui: A menu or GUI will likely open.
ui.welcome.idea.fallback.action.generic: The request will be converted into visual action blocks.

ui.shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
ui.shortcuts.desc: Customize command shortcuts. Context shortcuts override global shortcuts.
ui.official.title: OFFICIAL BUILD VERIFICATION & UPDATES
ui.official.desc: Integrity checks and in-app updates are locked to the official CraftIDE GitHub release channel.
ui.official.verifyPrompt: Use "Verify build" to compare your local build with the official checksums.
ui.official.assetPending: Recommended asset will appear after the official release check.
ui.official.assetNone: No downloadable setup or portable asset was found in the official release.
ui.official.updaterReady: Ready to check for updates from GitHub releases.
ui.official.updaterUpdateNotAvailableSta: You are on the latest version ({version}).
ui.official.updaterDownloadedStatus: Version {version} is ready. Restart to install.
ui.official.updaterNoDownloadable: No downloadable update is currently available.
ui.official.updaterQuitAndInstall: Closing application to install the downloaded update...
ui.official.manualLatestStatus: Official release v{version} checked. Manual update mode is active.
ui.official.manualUpdateAvailableStatus: Official release v{version} is available. Manual download is ready.
ui.official.updateAvailable: Update available: {current} -> {latest}. Use "Download update" to fetch it in-app.
ui.official.updateManualAvailable: Update available: {current} -> {latest}. Download "{asset}" from the official release page.
ui.official.updateDownloaded: Update downloaded: {current} -> {latest}. Click "Install update" to restart and apply it.
ui.official.updateNotAvailable: You are on the latest official version ({current}).
ui.official.updateDisabled: In-app auto update is unavailable for this build. {message}
ui.official.updateDownloading: Downloading official update {version} in the background.
ui.official.noDownloadReady: Check for updates first and wait for an available release.
ui.official.capability.windowsOnly: Official in-app updates are currently available only for Windows builds.
ui.official.capability.devBuild: Development builds can check official releases, but in-app installation requires a packaged installer build.
ui.official.capability.portableManual: Portable builds can check official releases and download updates manually. In-app installation requires the setup build.
ui.official.capability.installerReady: This installer build supports official in-app updates.
notify.aiFlowWizardFallback: AI flow is unavailable. Opened the guided builder instead.
notify.aiFlowFallback: AI flow is unavailable right now. Redirected to AI Assistant.
notify.creatorPathUnavailable: The selected creator path is unavailable right now. Opened the Visual Builder instead.
ui.official.verifyChecking: Checking local build integrity against official release checksums...
ui.official.verifyPortableBlocked: Portable builds are not eligible for integrity verification. Use the installer build.
ui.official.verifyLocalAsarMissing: Local app.asar is not available for this build.
ui.official.verifyLocalAsarReadError: Local app.asar could not be read: {error}
ui.official.verifyReleaseMissing: No official GitHub release found for this version.
ui.official.verifyChecksumsAsarMissing: app.asar hash not found in checksum file.
ui.official.verifyMatched: Local app.asar hash matches official release checksums.
ui.official.verifyMismatch: Local app.asar hash does not match official release checksums.
ui.official.installNotReady: A downloaded update is required before installation can start.
ui.official.installStarting: The app is restarting to install the update.

ui.vb.template.welcome_msg.name: Welcome Message
ui.vb.template.welcome_msg.desc: Show a custom message when a player joins.
ui.vb.template.spawn_command.name: /spawn Command
ui.vb.template.spawn_command.desc: Teleport the player to spawn when they type /spawn.
ui.vb.template.anti_drop.name: Anti-Item Drop
ui.vb.template.anti_drop.desc: Prevent item drops when the player dies.
ui.vb.template.op_command.name: Op Command
ui.vb.template.op_command.desc: Create a command that only operators can execute.
ui.vb.template.join_reward.name: Join Reward
ui.vb.template.join_reward.desc: Give a reward item when the player joins the server.
ui.vb.template.fabric_join.name: Fabric Join Message
ui.vb.template.fabric_join.desc: Send a message when a player joins on Fabric.
ui.vb.template.skript_welcome.name: Skript Welcome
ui.vb.template.skript_welcome.desc: Send a welcome message and broadcast on join.
ui.vb.template.skript_spawn_cmd.name: Skript /spawn Command
ui.vb.template.plugin_welcome_kit.name: Plugin Welcome Kit
ui.vb.template.plugin_welcome_kit.desc: Send a welcome message, starter item and sound on first join.
ui.vb.template.plugin_home_command.name: Plugin Home Command
ui.vb.template.plugin_home_command.desc: Create a simple /home teleport command with confirmation.
ui.vb.template.plugin_auto_broadcast.des: Broadcast repeating server tips after startup.
ui.vb.template.plugin_death_penalty.name: Plugin Death Penalty
ui.vb.template.plugin_death_penalty.desc: Warn the player on death and restore health after a delay.
ui.vb.template.fabric_join_reward.name: Fabric Join Reward
ui.vb.template.fabric_join_reward.desc: Send a message and reward item when a player joins on Fabric.
ui.vb.template.fabric_break_alert.name: Fabric Break Alert
ui.vb.template.fabric_break_alert.desc: Alert players when a block is broken.
ui.vb.template.fabric_scheduled_tip.name: Fabric Scheduled Tip
ui.vb.template.fabric_scheduled_tip.desc: Start a periodic tip broadcast when the server starts.
ui.vb.template.forge_login_message.name: Forge Login Message
ui.vb.template.forge_login_message.desc: Send a custom message when a Forge player logs in.
ui.vb.template.forge_guardian_spawn.name: Forge Guardian Spawn
ui.vb.template.forge_guardian_spawn.desc: Cancel block breaking and warn the player in a protected zone.
ui.vb.template.skript_warp_command.name: Skript Warp Command

ui.vb.template.skript_chat_filter.name: Skript Chat Filter
ui.vb.template.skript_chat_filter.desc: Cancel chat and notify the player with a simple moderation flow.
